text:
Epilepsy Centre 

Neurosciences Division 

Clinic Date: 15 April 2019 

Dr Eleanor Patel  
South Camden Neurology Clinic  
12 Wren Street, London, WC1N 2LL  

Dear Dr Eleanor Patel,  

Laura Bennett, DOB: 14-02-1998, Hospital No: H392771 NHS No. 8472105639  
Flat 3, 28 Brookfield Avenue, London, NW5 1TU  

Diagnoses: 

Epilepsy under review.

Thank you for reviewing Laura Bennett in our neurology clinic today with her mother in attendance. Since VNS optimisation at a previous visit, there has been a sustained improvement. Prior to that optimisation, her typical pattern was every 2 - 3 months a cluster of approximately five brief absences. She now reports Seizure-free off ASMs since 10/07/2018. She discontinued antiseizure medicines after a gradual taper supervised in clinic last year, and there have been no events suggestive of seizures, no injuries, and no emergency medication use since then.

The VNS device was interrogated; diagnostics are satisfactory with stable impedance and no indicator for battery replacement. No changes were made to parameters today. She has a magnet available but has not needed to use it for the past nine months. She and her family feel that alertness and day-to-day functioning have improved since stopping ASMs, with no adverse effects reported.

We discussed ongoing safety precautions and agreed to continue routine follow-up. In view of the excellent clinical trajectory, we will review in six months, with earlier contact if any events recur. She will keep a simple event diary and inform us if there are any episodes of concern.

Yours sincerely

entities.text: She now reports Seizure-free off ASMs since 10/07/2018.

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter states the patient reports being seizure-free off ASMs since 10/07/2018. Clinic date is 15 April 2019, which is approximately 9 months after 10 July 2018. This meets the 6-month criterion for seizure freedom. No current seizures are reported. Therefore, the seizure frequency should be normalized as 'seizure free for 9 month'. Prior frequency before VNS optimization was every 2 to 3 months a cluster of approximately five absences, but current status supersedes and shows sustained seizure freedom. Calculation: From 10 July 2018 to 15 April 2019 ≈ 9 months.
seizure_frequency_number: She now reports Seizure-free off ASMs since 10/07/2018.
